artifacts.name: Potion of Healing
artifacts.description: A red glimmering potion that restores 2d4+2 hit points when consumed. Its potency varies by rarity, but the basic healing version is common.

artifacts.name: Potion of Climbing
artifacts.description: Drinking this potion grants a climbing speed equal to your walking speed for 1 hour and advantage on Athletics checks to climb. The liquid forms layered bands of brown, silver, and gray.
